name: MEV Protection (Flashbots Protect + Slippage Discipline)
description: Submit swap transactions through a private relay (Flashbots Protect, MEV-Blocker, BloXroute) to avoid sandwich attacks, while enforcing tight slippage bounds. Behavioural skill — verified by sampling the agent's recent trades.

steps.description: Set wallet RPC to a private mempool: Flashbots Protect (https://rpc.flashbots.net/fast) or MEV-Blocker (https://rpc.mevblocker.io).
Set amountOutMinimum = quote × (1 - 0.5%) for stables and (1 - 1%) for volatile pairs. Reject swaps that exceed this slippage.
Set deadline = block.timestamp + 60s for time-sensitive swaps to minimize re-org risk.
Split orders > 1% of pool liquidity into N smaller chunks to dilute MEV opportunity.

manual.review_criteria: Verifier samples the agent's 3 most recent swaps. Confirms: (1) all originated from a private relay (Flashbots / MEV-Blocker / Eden coinbase tip pattern), (2) all had amountOutMinimum within the declared bounds, (3) none was sandwiched (no large buy-sell-buy pattern in the same block).
manual.submit_via: POST /api/verify/manual with { agent, skillId, txHashes: [tx1, tx2, tx3] }
